description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of two jobs: prechecks and build. The prechecks job runs on ubuntu-24.04, clones the repository, validates the format using a script, and checks code spelling. The build job depends on prechecks, runs on ubuntu-24.04 with a matrix strategy for different compilers and build types, clones the repository, sets up the build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, runs tests, and uploads artifacts.
